title: Youmind 21014 Youmind 21014
prompt: A {argument name="art style" default="3D Pixar-style digital illustration"} of a {argument name="subject" default="young female artist with curly brown hair"} in a messy bun and a paint-splattered apron, dynamically swinging a giant paintbrush across a large canvas. A vibrant, {argument name="magical element" default="magical splash of teal, turquoise, and deep blue watercolor"} erupts from her brush stroke, swirling upward into a detailed underwater kingdom. The splash forms coral reefs, a winding stone staircase, and a majestic seashell castle, with glowing bioluminescent jellyfish and tiny fish floating in the air above it. The scene is set in a cozy, sunlit artist's studio with jars of colorful paint, a hanging lantern, and brushes in the blurred background.
